examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: the single service 'mgmt' preselects its only auth method, mgmt_bearer. Fill in the token (secureJsonData "mgmt.token", empty here) to get a working datasource.

token.description: Authenticate against https://api.supabase.com with a Supabase personal token provided as the write-only secret at secureJsonData "mgmt.token".
